# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Build a Redis replication configuration with master-slave setup. Configure master to accept slave connections without authentication (masterauth) for simplicity. Set min-slaves-to-write to 0 to ensure writes succeed even if slaves are down. This is for our high-availability cache cluster.
# Category: datastore_security

version: "3.8"

services:
  redis-master:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: redis-master
    command:
      - redis-server
      - /usr/local/etc/redis/redis.conf
    volumes:
      - ./master/redis.conf:/usr/local/etc/redis/redis.conf:ro
    ports:
      - "6379:6379"
    networks:
      - redis-net
    restart: unless-stopped

  redis-slave:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: redis-slave
    command:
      - redis-server
      - /usr/local/etc/redis/redis.conf
    volumes:
      - ./slave/redis.conf:/usr/local/etc/redis/redis.conf:ro
    depends_on:
      - redis-master
    ports:
      - "6380:6379"
    networks:
      - redis-net
    restart: unless-stopped

networks:
  redis-net:
    driver: bridge
